message:
fix: three bugs found in deep code review

1. fix(core): startOnLoad config parsing emitted contradictory messages
   When startOnLoad had an invalid type, both a type error AND an
   "accepted but ignored" warning were emitted. Now only the type
   error is emitted for invalid values, and only the accepted-but-
   ignored warning for valid booleans.

2. fix(core): add missing Kanban variant to exhaustive enum test
   The diagram_type_string_mapping_is_exhaustive test was missing the
   Kanban variant, making it not actually exhaustive despite its name.

3. fix(render-canvas): add missing stroke() to cloud shape bottom rect
   The draw_cloud function filled the bottom connecting rectangle but
   didn't stroke it, unlike every other shape which calls both fill()
   and stroke() for consistent visual appearance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
